name: bidreg-mcp
description: MCP server for Kellogg BidReg — bid stats, TCE, schedule, and my classes via cached CSV exports.

scripts.build: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
